agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 135 -- US-263 SHIPPED passes:true (Sprint 22 boot-reason detector + startup_log writer). FOUR new/updated artifacts: src/pi/diagnostics/boot_reason.py NEW (~360 lines: DI'd detectBootReason + recordBootReason + writeStartupLog with INSERT OR IGNORE idempotency on boot_id PK; parses `journalctl --list-boots` for prior boot enumeration, then probes prior boot's tail with `-b <id> -n 100 --reverse` and matches against 9 canonical SHUTDOWN_MARKERS; graceful degradation on every I/O failure path -- never crashes startup), src/pi/diagnostics/__init__.py NEW (package marker for future diagnostics work), src/pi/obdii/database_schema.py UPDATE (+SCHEMA_STARTUP_LOG: boot_id PK / prior_boot_clean INTEGER nullable / prior_last_entry_ts TEXT / current_boot_first_entry_ts TEXT / recorded_at TEXT canonical-ISO-8601-UTC strftime DEFAULT; wired into ALL_SCHEMAS), tests/pi/diagnostics/test_boot_reason.py NEW (~430 lines / 44 tests / 11 classes covering normalize/parse/marker pure helpers + clean-shutdown happy path + crash path + 4 degradation cases + 5 writer cases incl. idempotency invariant + 4 end-to-end recordBootReason cases + 3 boot-id surface tests + 4 subprocess wrapper tests). Verification: 44/44 new tests PASS in 14.7s; tests/pi/obdii + tests/pi/diagnostics subset 522 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failures in 96.98s; full fast suite 3801 passed / 26 failed / 17 skipped / 19 deselected in 920.41s -- baseline (Session 134 close per US-262) was 3757 pass / 26 fail, delta +44 pass = exactly the new test count + ZERO regressions; the 26 failures match Session 134 baseline (24 TD-042 + 1 TD-044 + 1 residual TD-042 -- closed by US-268 + US-269 later this sprint). Wiring deferred per stopCondition: recordBootReason is exposed as the one-liner orchestrator-startup callsite but the integration into src/pi/main.py / src/pi/obdii/orchestrator/lifecycle.py was not done in this story (the second stopCondition explicitly permits 'defer the integration call to a separate story' if it would create ordering dependency with sync or capture loop -- the safer scope was to ship the module + schema + tests now, leave the wiring as a documented follow-up). Phantom-path drift: scope.filesToRead listed src/pi/lifecycle.py (does not exist; orchestrator lifecycle is at src/pi/obdii/orchestrator/lifecycle.py). Same 8-session pattern as US-262. Sprint 22 status now: 2/8 shipped (US-262 + US-263); remaining 6 unclaimed (US-264 dashboard / US-265+US-266+US-267 discriminator trio / US-268 TD-042 / US-269 TD-044).
